back_translation: The LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:
"The Israelites shall camp around the Tent of Meeting at some distance from it, each man under his own standard, with the marks of his ancestral house.
Those who camp on the east side, toward the rising of the sun, are the standard of the camp of Judah according to their armies; and the leader of the sons of Judah is Nahshon son of Amminadab,
and his army and those counted of them — 74,600.
And those camping next to him is the tribe of Issachar; and the leader of the sons of Issachar is Nethanel son of Zuar,
and his army and those counted of him — 54,400.
And the tribe of Zebulun; and the leader of the sons of Zebulun is Eliab son of Helon,
and his army and those counted of him — 57,400.
All those counted for the camp of Judah, according to their armies — 186,400. They shall set out first.
The standard of the camp of Reuben on the south side, according to their armies; and the leader of the sons of Reuben is Elizur son of Shedeur,
and his army and those counted of him — 46,500.
And those camping next to him is the tribe of Simeon; and the leader of the sons of Simeon is Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai,
and his army and those counted of them — 59,300.
And the tribe of Gad; and the leader of the sons of Gad is Eliasaph son of Reuel,
and his army and those counted of them — 45,650.
All those counted for the camp of Reuben — 151,450, according to their armies. They shall set out second.
And the Tent of Meeting shall set out, the camp of the Levites in the middle of the camps; just as they camp, so they shall set out, each man in his place under their standards.
The standard of the camp of Ephraim, according to their armies, on the west side; and the leader of the sons of Ephraim is Elishama son of Ammihud,
and his army and those counted of them — 40,500.
And next to him is the tribe of Manasseh; and the leader of the sons of Manasseh is Gamaliel son of Pedahzur,
and his army and those counted of them — 32,200.
And the tribe of Benjamin; and the leader of the sons of Benjamin is Abidan son of Gideoni,
and his army and those counted of them — 35,400.
All those counted for the camp of Ephraim — 108,100, according to their armies. They shall set out third.
The standard of the camp of Dan, according to their armies, on the north side; and the leader of the sons of Dan is Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai,
and his army and those counted of them — 62,700.
And those camping next to him is the tribe of Asher; and the leader of the sons of Asher is Pagiel son of Ocran,
and his army and those counted of them — 41,500.
And the tribe of Naphtali; and the leader of the sons of Naphtali is Ahira son of Enan,
and his army and those counted of them — 53,400.
All those counted for the camp of Dan — 157,600. They shall set out last, under their standards."
These are those counted of the Israelites according to their ancestral houses. The total of those counted of the camps, according to their armies — 603,550.
But the Levites were not counted in the midst of the Israelites, as the LORD had commanded Moses.

So the Israelites did according to everything that the LORD commanded Moses; they camped under their standards in this way, and they set out in this way, each man according to his clan, according to his ancestral house.
